description: Configures Okta branding (theme colors) and security notification emails. Theme resources are commented out pending branding API availability — security notification emails are always deployable.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk-profile-driven behavior — branding is cosmetic and notifications are boolean.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk-profile-driven behavior — branding is cosmetic and notifications are boolean.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk-profile-driven behavior — branding is cosmetic and notifications are boolean.

primary_color.label: Primary Brand Color
primary_color.client_description: Your brand's primary color (hex code). Applied to the Okta sign-in page background, buttons, and headers. Must include the '#' prefix.

secondary_color.label: Secondary / Accent Color
secondary_color.client_description: Your brand's secondary/accent color (hex code). Applied to links, highlights, and interactive elements on the Okta sign-in page.

enable_security_notifications.label: Enable Security Notification Emails
enable_security_notifications.client_description: Whether to enable Okta's built-in security notification emails. When enabled, users receive emails for new device logins, MFA enrollment/reset, password changes, and can report suspicious activity. Strongly recommended — disable only if you have an external notification system.

custom_domain.label: Custom Sign-In Domain
custom_domain.client_description: A custom domain for your Okta sign-in page (e.g., 'login.yourcompany.com'). Requires DNS CNAME configuration. Leave null to use the default Okta domain.

outputs.security_notifications_enabled: Whether security notification emails are enabled
